## Qaid v0.7.3 — Header order

- **Reordered the Sebeeta headers** so the "Table" / "الطاوله" header sits directly above the player scores. New top-to-bottom order: Target header → Target boxes → Table header → player scores.

### Verification

- `npm run typecheck` clean
- `npm test` 237/237 passing
- `npm run build` succeeds
- Verified live
